news.title:
Tax holiday for data centres extended to 2047, boosting long-term investment outlook.
Policy supports power and real estate stocks like Adani, Anant Raj, and CtrlS Datacenters.
news.summary:
Tax holiday for data centres extended to 2047, boosting long-term investment outlook.
Policy supports power and real estate stocks like Adani, Anant Raj, and CtrlS Datacenters.

news.title:
Anant Raj partners with Submer Technologies for AI-ready, energy-efficient data centers.
The partnership supports Digital India goals with high-density computing platforms.
news.summary:
Anant Raj partners with Submer Technologies for AI-ready, energy-efficient data centers.
The partnership supports Digital India goals with high-density computing platforms.

news.title:
Budget 2026 tax holidays for data centres and CERs to boost realty.
Infrastructure funding for tier 2/3 cities may uplift India's realty sector.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 tax holidays for data centres and CERs to boost realty.
Infrastructure funding for tier 2/3 cities may uplift India's realty sector.

news.title:
Anant Raj shares rose 7%, E2E Networks surged 13% after a Budget push for data centres.
FM Sitharaman announced tax holidays till 2047 for foreign cloud service firms using Indian data centres.
news.summary:
Anant Raj shares rose 7%, E2E Networks surged 13% after a Budget push for data centres.
FM Sitharaman announced tax holidays till 2047 for foreign cloud service firms using Indian data centres.

news.title:
Anant Raj's Q3 EBITDA rose to 1.7B rupees from 1.34B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 26.5% from 25.1% YoY.
news.summary:
Anant Raj's Q3 EBITDA rose to 1.7B rupees from 1.34B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 26.5% from 25.1% YoY.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2026 and noted operational updates, including credit rating upgrades.
Key developments include real estate launches, cloud services expansion, and a 50 MW data center MOU with Andhra Pradesh.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2026 and noted operational updates, including credit rating upgrades.
Key developments include real estate launches, cloud services expansion, and a 50 MW data center MOU with Andhra Pradesh.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd's credit ratings were upgraded by Infomerics Valuation and Rating Ltd.
Long-term rating improved to IVR A (Stable) and short-term to IVR A2+.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd's credit ratings were upgraded by Infomerics Valuation and Rating Ltd.
Long-term rating improved to IVR A (Stable) and short-term to IVR A2+.

news.title:
Nifty Realty index dropped 1.08% to 848.7, marking a 7.85% decline over 7 sessions.
Stock moves: Signatureglobal fell 2.1%, Macrotech 1.8%, Brigade 1.5%, Anant Raj 1.4%, Prestige 1.3%.
news.summary:
Nifty Realty index dropped 1.08% to 848.7, marking a 7.85% decline over 7 sessions.
Stock moves: Signatureglobal fell 2.1%, Macrotech 1.8%, Brigade 1.5%, Anant Raj 1.4%, Prestige 1.3%.

news.title:
India's data center sector may need $70-80B by 2030 as AI and cloud demand surge. Capacity must grow from 1.5GW to 3GW by 2030.
Anant Raj plans 117MW capacity in coming years; co-location offers 60-70% ROI. Yotta highlights domestic cloud demand driving growth.
news.summary:
India's data center sector may need $70-80B by 2030 as AI and cloud demand surge. Capacity must grow from 1.5GW to 3GW by 2030.
Anant Raj plans 117MW capacity in coming years; co-location offers 60-70% ROI. Yotta highlights domestic cloud demand driving growth.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd's subsidiaries acquired 100% interest in Blessed Landbase LLP for Rs. 20,000.
The acquisition aims to align and expand Anant Raj Ltd's core real estate operations.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd's subsidiaries acquired 100% interest in Blessed Landbase LLP for Rs. 20,000.
The acquisition aims to align and expand Anant Raj Ltd's core real estate operations.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises, Anant Raj, and Phoenix Mills lead gains as Nifty Realty rises 1.48% to 900.15.
Realty sector sees growth optimism for FY26 amid brighter outlook, despite affordability concerns and rising costs.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises, Anant Raj, and Phoenix Mills lead gains as Nifty Realty rises 1.48% to 900.15.
Realty sector sees growth optimism for FY26 amid brighter outlook, despite affordability concerns and rising costs.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd reports Q2 FY26 earnings with 23% YoY revenue growth.
Net debt below ₹50 Cr for 5 quarters; data center expansion planned to 117 MW by FY28.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd reports Q2 FY26 earnings with 23% YoY revenue growth.
Net debt below ₹50 Cr for 5 quarters; data center expansion planned to 117 MW by FY28.

news.title:
Six stocks pledged crores in Andhra Pradesh for new initiatives, spanning defence, aerospace, renewables, and more.
Stocks like EPACK, Premier Explosives, Anant Raj, TruAlt, Raymond, and GRSE see gains after MoUs for investments.
news.summary:
Six stocks pledged crores in Andhra Pradesh for new initiatives, spanning defence, aerospace, renewables, and more.
Stocks like EPACK, Premier Explosives, Anant Raj, TruAlt, Raymond, and GRSE see gains after MoUs for investments.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd's subsidiary signed an MoU with Andhra Pradesh Economic Development Board.
Plans include a Rs 4,500 crore Data Center & IT Park, creating 8,500 direct jobs.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd's subsidiary signed an MoU with Andhra Pradesh Economic Development Board.
Plans include a Rs 4,500 crore Data Center & IT Park, creating 8,500 direct jobs.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd aims to achieve 117 MW Data Center capacity by FY28.
Q2 PAT rose 30%; expansion planned across Manesar, Rai, Panchkula.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd aims to achieve 117 MW Data Center capacity by FY28.
Q2 PAT rose 30%; expansion planned across Manesar, Rai, Panchkula.

news.title:
Anant Raj Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY25, with revenue from operations at Rs. 370.6 Cr and profit at Rs. 74.2 Cr.
Operational updates include Rs. 1,100 Cr QIP completion, Rs. 125 Cr debt prepayment, and expansion in real estate and data center services.
news.summary:
Anant Raj Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 FY25, with revenue from operations at Rs. 370.6 Cr and profit at Rs. 74.2 Cr.
Operational updates include Rs. 1,100 Cr QIP completion, Rs. 125 Cr debt prepayment, and expansion in real estate and data center services.
